mapper.insert: insert into interview_report (session_id, total_score, dimension_scores, strengths, weaknesses, suggestions, next_training, raw_content, status) values (#{sessionId}, #{totalScore}, #{dimensionScores}, #{strengths}, #{weaknesses}, #{suggestions}, #{nextTraining}, #{rawContent}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, session_id, total_score, dimension_scores, strengths, weaknesses, suggestions, next_training, raw_content, status, created_at, updated_at from interview_report where session_id = #{sessionId}
